notableEvents.label: Marcus Semien reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Marcus Semien reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Royce Lewis. Francisco Alvarez to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Bo Bichette GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Bo Bichette grounds into a double play, second baseman Luke Keaschall to shortstop Brooks Lee to first baseman Kody Clemens. Tyrone Taylor out at 2nd. Bo Bichette out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Francisco Alvarez GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Francisco Alvarez grounds into a double play, shortstop Brooks Lee to second baseman Luke Keaschall to first baseman Kody Clemens. Brett Baty out at 2nd. Francisco Alvarez out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: With Brett Baty batting, Juan Soto picked off and caught stealing 2nd base, shortstop Brooks Lee.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Marcus Semien reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Royce Lewis. Francisco Alvarez to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Marcus Semien reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Royce Lewis. Francisco Alvarez to 3rd.
